textByHash.1f2c55bd30beb1f921ea36a5e71816fbd2a59700: Is there any way I can help?
textByHash.d046cd1e5abc8a18ede00689efac6aa6c574a76f: Someone pushed it under my door just before you arrived. I went outside to see who it was but they'd already gone by the time I got there.
textByHash.31b5ea00b0ff4f92a1a6fe0f5473fbdb42901e39: Sure, but I don't think you have enough space in your pack to hold it.
textByHash.88ad7435e1b59003a5db67ed9a2a1e6c35ad25c6: Glad I could be of service. Anything else you need?
textByHash.3c71c67dc68a55ab320b7a5bf781196f0299c72b: Really? That's the nicest thing anyone has ever said.
textByHash.d73b43b7691f4419785bbde55ace83bbdd9e6b78: I admire him a great deal. He works so hard for this town.
textByHash.73f7a510b586a6b4eb3c8accb39e813e3fb3819e: Hmm, I don't think I do.
textByHash.b109b99347f0537dbae1aa8bfb1a12040fb39daa: Well, I haven't spoken to him in a while. I don't get out much.
textByHash.86f96eb25fe07e107887067b523b1faf16ce2447: Maybe the Mayor has finally seen how much I admire him and has grown to admire me?
textByHash.af9bbefe5f6d3a317de39ac6961e432779d8d009: Well hello there; welcome to our little village. Pray, stay awhile.
textByHash.b1662ee47f182f8fa6598397d2ae8b61781c420f: I supply the local fishermen with the tools and bait they need to do their job.
textByHash.a9900dcf92ce4ad837841cd635253fa084e2cf33: Why yes, all of my life. I took over from my father, who inherited the business from his father and so on.
textByHash.502c962d46c5b479692ecd21071634594766d8a0: In fact, there have been Lovecraft's selling bait for over ten generations.
textByHash.ce0b907ed01d2ef387449261f179f87b4d21491c: Oh yes, we have a long and interesting family history. For one reason or another the Lovecraft's have always been bait sellers or writers.
textByHash.1c3b01592ca2ee9c91909f049e2cdc34cda3de40: Oh very, very fascinating, for instance my great grandfather Howard...
